title: How to download statement
text: To download your mutual fund statement on Groww: Log in to the Groww app or website, go to Investments > Mutual Funds, select the fund or view All Holdings, and use the Statement or Download option to get your account statement. For step-by-step help, visit Groww Help & Support.

title: How to download capital gains report
text: To download your capital gains report for mutual funds on Groww: Log in to Groww, go to Investments or Tax/Reports section, and look for Capital Gains or Tax Statement. You can download the report for a financial year. For detailed steps, visit Groww Help & Support.

title: How to update KYC
text: To update KYC for mutual funds on Groww: Log in to your account, go to Profile or Settings, and look for KYC or PAN details. You can update details as per the options provided. For mutual fund KYC, ensure your details are updated with the KRA (KYC Registration Agency). For step-by-step instructions, visit Groww Help & Support.
